hero.description: Innovative digital solutions for healthcare professionals. Manage appointments, patients, and medical records from a single platform.

turnosmedicos.label: Star Product
turnosmedicos.title: TurnosMedicos
turnosmedicos.subtitle: The most complete appointment management system for clinics and medical practices. Optimize your schedule and improve your patients' experience.
turnosmedicos.feature1_text: Automated appointment management with automatic reminders and confirmations.
turnosmedicos.feature2_text: Secure access to patient information from any device.
turnosmedicos.feature3_text: Analyze your practice performance with real-time metrics.
turnosmedicos.feature4_text: Connect with insurance companies, laboratories, and other healthcare systems.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions to digitize and optimize your medical practice management.
services.service1_text: Professional and customized websites for healthcare professionals.
services.service2_text: Native applications for iOS and Android with all functionalities.
services.service3_text: Video consultation platform integrated with your management system.
services.service4_text: Automated billing and insurance claims management.
services.service5_text: Positioning strategies to attract new patients.
services.service6_text: Permanent technical assistance to ensure operational continuity.

pricing.title: Plans & Pricing

about.text: At doctore.ar we combine cutting-edge technology with deep healthcare industry knowledge to develop solutions that truly improve daily medical practice.
